note: Per-Mtoken USD prices used by scripts/lib/bakeoff/pricing.mjs to compute cost-per-successful-run. ONLY enter prices you have verified against the provider's current price sheet — when a model's prices are null, the harness ranks by measured output tokens and says so in the report. Never guess a price. Claude models run on the Claude Code subscription (no marginal API cost) and are benchmarks only; they stay null on purpose.
